title: Asphalt
writer: Joe May, Hans Székely, Rolf E. Vanloo
actors: Albert Steinrück, Else Heller, Gustav Fröhlich
plot: Joe May's sensual drama of life in the Berlin underworld is in many ways the perfect summation of German filmmaking in the silent era: a dazzling visual style, a psychological approach to its characters, and the ability to take a ...
